channel.title: ICL Journal
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in ICL Journal

item.title: Nil Nisi Bene
item.description: Article by Matthias Lukan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0045

item.title: When Populism Meets the Constitutional Dimension: A Formal Framework for Facilitating Comparative Constitutional Studies

item.title: Emergency Labor Constitutionalism and Emergency Regulations

item.title: Constitutional Reform in a Fragile and Conflict-Affected Environment? Outlook on Constitutional Reform Processes in Ethiopia
item.description: Article by Matthias Lukan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0016

item.title: Countering Democratic Decay Judicially: Is Resistance Futile?
item.description: Article by Matthias Lukan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0019

item.title: Robert Böttner & Hermann-Josef Blanke: The Rule of Law Under Threat – Eroding Institutions and European Remedies
item.description: Article by Matthias Lukan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0034
